# UX & Interaction Requirements Quality Checklist: Notification System

**Purpose**: Validate the spec and plan for completeness, clarity, consistency, and coverage of user interactions, edge cases, and the Zustand store contract before task generation.
**Created**: 2026-05-03
**Feature**: [spec.md](spec.md) | [plan.md](plan.md) | [contracts/store-contract.md](contracts/store-contract.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command. Items test the *quality of requirements writing*, not the implementation.

---

## Requirement Completeness

- [X] CHK001 Are animation requirements (slide-in from right, exit transition) explicitly specified with timing values in the functional requirements? [Completeness, Gap]
- [X] CHK002 Are visual requirements for the unread-count badge when the count is zero explicitly specified (hidden vs. showing "0")? [Completeness, Spec §FR-008]
- [X] CHK003 Are empty-state requirements defined for the bell dropdown when no notifications exist? [Completeness, Gap]
- [X] CHK004 Are keyboard accessibility requirements specified for toast dismissal and bell dropdown interaction? [Completeness, Gap]
- [X] CHK005 Are requirements for focus management when the bell dropdown opens/closes explicitly documented? [Completeness, Gap]
- [X] CHK006 Are the exact visual type indicators (icons, colors) for each `NotificationType` enumerated in the requirements? [Completeness, Spec §FR-002, Spec §FR-003]
- [X] CHK007 Are stacking/spacing requirements between concurrent toasts quantified (gap size, max visible count)? [Completeness, Gap]

## Requirement Clarity

- [X] CHK008 Is the exact Toast dismissal interaction clearly specified: does clicking anywhere on the toast dismiss it, or only the X button? [Clarity, Spec §FR-005]
- [X] CHK009 Is the "relative timestamp" update frequency defined (real-time, every 10s, every minute)? [Clarity, Spec §FR-011]
- [X] CHK010 Are the "10 most recent notifications" ordered by creation time (newest first) or addition time (FIFO)? [Clarity, Spec §FR-010]
- [X] CHK011 Is the behavior when marking an already-read notification as read explicitly defined as idempotent in the spec (not just the data model)? [Clarity, Spec §FR-012]
- [X] CHK012 Is "clear all" defined as destructive (no undo) or reversible in the requirements? [Clarity, Spec §FR-014]
- [X] CHK013 Are the visual differences between a "read" and "unread" notification in the dropdown explicitly specified (e.g., opacity, bold text, background color)? [Clarity, Gap]

## Requirement Consistency

- [X] CHK014 Is the data-model `Notification` entity consistent with the `Notification` interface in the store contract (`dismissTimer` field missing in contract)? [Consistency, data-model.md vs contracts/store-contract.md]
- [X] CHK015 Do the spec requirements and plan agree on whether the notification store persists across page reloads (spec says "at least for the current user session"; plan says "no persistence required per spec")? [Consistency, Spec §Assumptions vs plan.md Technical Context]
- [X] CHK016 Does the plan's reference to "popover (or `dropdown-menu`)" create an ambiguous component choice that should be resolved in the requirements? [Consistency, plan.md §shadcn/ui Bell + Popover]
- [X] CHK017 Do the success criteria and functional requirements agree on the auto-dismiss duration (SC-002 says "within 4 seconds" vs FR-004 says "after 4 seconds")? [Consistency, Spec §SC-002 vs Spec §FR-004]
- [X] CHK018 Is the max stored notification count (50 in plan, data model) aligned with a specific functional requirement, or is it an implementation detail that leaked into the design? [Consistency, plan.md vs data-model.md]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [X] CHK019 Are requirements defined for the behavior when the bell dropdown is open and a new notification arrives (auto-insert, bump to top, no change until re-open)? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [X] CHK020 Are requirements for rapid sequential triggers (notification spam) defined beyond storage limits (e.g., debounce, rate-limit UI feedback)? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [X] CHK021 Are overflow requirements defined for when concurrent toasts exceed screen vertical capacity (scroll, collapse older, cap max visible)? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [X] CHK022 Are error-state requirements specified for when the notification store encounters an invalid state mutation (e.g., non-existent ID passed to `markAsRead`)? [Edge Case, Gap]
- [X] CHK023 Are requirements for browser/tab-background behavior defined (e.g., do timers continue when tab is inactive)? [Edge Case, Gap]

## Scenario Coverage

- [X] CHK024 Does the spec define an alternate flow where a user manually dismisses a toast and then views it in the bell history? [Scenario Coverage, Alternate Flow]
- [X] CHK025 Are requirements for the "clear all" confirmation or undo flow specified (single-click or confirmation step)? [Scenario Coverage, Spec §FR-014]
- [X] CHK026 Are non-functional requirements (animation performance, max render time) quantified beyond the plan's performance goals? [Scenario Coverage, Non-Functional]
- [X] CHK027 Are responsive layout requirements specified for the toast container and bell dropdown on mobile viewports? [Scenario Coverage, Gap]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [X] CHK028 Is SC-001 (identify type within 1 second) measurable without user studies, given only icon + color requirements exist? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001]
- [X] CHK029 Is SC-005 (locate notification within 5 seconds) tied to specific scannability requirements (e.g., max 10 items, type grouping)? [Measurability, Spec §SC-005]
- [X] CHK030 Are the acceptance scenarios testable without referencing implementation details (e.g., "4 seconds" is a requirement, not an implementation)? [Measurability, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios]

## Contract Completeness

- [X] CHK031 Is the `dismissTimer` field explicitly included in the store-contract `Notification` interface to ensure contract-data-model alignment? [Contract Completeness, contracts/store-contract.md]
- [X] CHK032 Are selector contracts (`activeToasts`, `unreadCount`, `recentNotifications`) documented as part of the public store interface, or are they internal implementation details? [Contract Completeness, data-model.md §Derived Selectors]
- [X] CHK033 Is the behavior of `clearAll` with respect to clearing active timers specified in the store contract (present in event flow but not in action signatures)? [Contract Completeness, contracts/store-contract.md §clearAll]
- [X] CHK034 Are input validation requirements for store actions specified (e.g., empty string message, unknown `NotificationType`)? [Contract Completeness, Gap]
